title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Yamato, Unknown person #12 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Rather than their violent conduct...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm more concerned about the after- effects.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: such increase in ferocity and strength... and abnormal freezing of the skin too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way a human body can endure this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How do we take them out!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are they zombies or what!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What if...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We leave them be, would they!?...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They'll die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Muhahaha if you're infected,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You die within an hour!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These ice demons, were they your friends? Your leaders? Your subordinates? MUBAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right now, they are probably the most excited they've ever been!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: gyaa- AAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure to kiss them goodbye!! You'd get infected though!! Muahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PLEASE STOP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's gone and created another repulsive weapon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm getting the hell out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey! Open this door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heey! Brother a poo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What's this...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the one and only antibody that exists in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, for the ice demon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that gets stolen, it's the chopping block for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Say what!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, let's begin the "Queen presents" live game show--!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't be a game if I didn't give you a fighting chance!! So, murder! Betrayal! Anything goes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anti- body?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A game of tag with the ice. Demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is that an anti- body!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro! Please steal that off of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm on it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let them get their hands on it!Our comrades will die if we do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't let the Samural recover!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: >> Wait! Queen! This is way too crazy you bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apoo, if you manage to escape for an hour, you win and everyone dies!! Muhahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fight and kill each other over it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't really think you can escape us with that kind of burden, do you!?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Young Master Yamato!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who are you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Our mission...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will end as long as we kill that brat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't know who you are, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you are an ally, please protect master momono- suke.

dialogue.speaker: Shinobu
dialogue.text: I'll save you too!! Miss Shinobu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago... I was present at Kouzuki Oden's execution!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
